visualizations.title: Set and Successor Representation
visualizations.description: Mathematical representation of the Natural Numbers set.

steps.explanation: Standard mathematical symbol representing the infinite set of all natural numbers.
Enumeration starting at 1, demonstrating that the set is discrete and ordered.
Peano successor function: Every natural number n has a unique successor S(n) that is also a natural number.

visualizations.title: 2D Discrete Succession Animation
visualizations.description: Visualizing counting on a timeline by generating discrete elements sequentially.
